title: Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Floor Manager to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited:
Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited!
